How's it going team? In this video we're going to go over click funnels. So click funnels is a really cool platform. We use it quite a bit for everything. We use it internally and we also recommend you use it as well for a ton of different features including drag-and-drop page builder that lets you create pages without a single line of code. You can create your own funnels. So start with a shared funnel that a friend or we provide or use the premade templates that click funnels provides directly free of charge with your membership. You can create basic web pages to full featured funnels for opt-in, membership, order sales, upsells, webinars and more. You can even purchase and manage custom domain names like a dot-com to create branded URLs for your funnels. You can connect other platforms for automation including Zapier and Payment Gayways. And they even have built-in split testing so that you can collect stats on what works and what doesn't especially if you're doing cold traffic. Now we use click funnels for quite a few different things including cold traffic ads as opt-in funnels to get leads. We use internal opt-in funnels for existing members and warm leads. You can use it to collect information, embed forms to get more information like woofoo forms or even click funnel forms itself and to make sure you're getting quality leads and qualify them. And you can also embed a QD scheduler directly in there. So as part of that initial opt-in, they're scheduling their appointment right away. You can create training membership funnels for staff training. You can do workout and nutrition membership funnels for challengers. You can even create webinar funnels for education and brand awareness. So we're going to show you how to do a few different things with click funnels. We provide some example funnels as well throughout the portal that you can use for different reasons. If you have any questions about click funnels or intercom support or expert tech support agents are always happy to help. They're rock stars. Well, I hope you enjoyed this video and hope you have a great rest of your day.
